# Code of Conduct

This project has adopted the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org),
version 2.1, as its Code of Conduct. The full text is available at:

https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/

In short: we are committed to providing a welcoming, harassment-free experience
for everyone, and we expect all participants to act professionally and
respectfully in all project spaces.

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, please report it to the
project maintainer at **abegong@gmail.com**. All reports will be reviewed and
handled confidentially.
